heading: Deposit of remainder of excess amount into Treasury as indirect restitution
label: 4503 Deposit of remainder of excess amount into Treasury as indirect restitution
text: The amount that remains from the excess amount described in section 4502(c) of this title after all disbursements have been made for a fiscal year under section 4502(d) of this title shall be deposited by the Secretary of the Treasury into the general fund of the Treasury.11See References in Text note below.1
notes: References in TextSection 4502(c) and (d) of this title, referred to in text, was repealed by .section 4502(e) of this title
